targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(bt.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = bt.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) FROM budget_targets bt WHERE bt.monthly_limit > 0), 0) * 100, 1) as value FROM transactions t INNER JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month')
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(bt.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = bt.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) FROM budget_targets bt WHERE bt.monthly_limit > 0), 0) * 100, 1) as value FROM transactions t INNER JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month')

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(1) as value FROM (SELECT b.category FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category HAVING COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) > (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(1) as value FROM (SELECT b.category FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category HAVING COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) > (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct), 1) as value FROM (SELECT substr(t.date,1,7) as month, SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(bt.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = bt.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) FROM budget_targets bt WHERE bt.monthly_limit > 0), 0) * 100 as pct FROM transactions t WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct), 1) as value FROM (SELECT substr(t.date,1,7) as month, SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(bt.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = bt.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) FROM budget_targets bt WHERE bt.monthly_limit > 0), 0) * 100 as pct FROM transactions t WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) * 100, 1) as pct_used FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY pct_used DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) * 100, 1) as pct_used FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY pct_used DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 2) as spent, ROUND((b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as budget, ROUND(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))) - (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as over_by FROM budget_targets b INNER JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category HAVING spent > budget ORDER BY over_by DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 2) as spent, ROUND((b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as budget, ROUND(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))) - (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as over_by FROM budget_targets b INNER JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category HAVING spent > budget ORDER BY over_by DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30 / (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) * 100, 1) as projected_pct FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_pct DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30 / (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) * 100, 1) as projected_pct FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_pct DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0), 2) as current_spend, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_spend, ROUND((b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as budget, ROUND((b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) - COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_surplus FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_surplus
targets.queryText: SELECT b.category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0), 2) as current_spend, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_spend, ROUND((b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as budget, ROUND((b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) - COALESCE(SUM(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)))), 0) / MAX(1, julianday('now') - julianday('${cycle}-07')) * 30, 2) as projected_surplus FROM budget_targets b LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.category = b.category AND t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY projected_surplus

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT t.date, t.description, t.amount, t.currency, ROUND((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as amount_converted, t.category_group, t.category, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0))) / (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_of_budget FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND t.category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) AND t.category IN (${category:sqlstring}) ORDER BY t.date DESC, ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0))) DESC LIMIT 500
targets.queryText: SELECT t.date, t.description, t.amount, t.currency, ROUND((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)), 2) as amount_converted, t.category_group, t.category, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0))) / (b.monthly_limit * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = b.currency AND date <= date('now') ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0)) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_of_budget FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN budget_targets b ON t.category = b.category WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= '${cycle}-07' AND t.date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND t.category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) AND t.category IN (${category:sqlstring}) ORDER BY t.date DESC, ABS((t.amount * COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = '${currency}' AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0) / COALESCE((SELECT rate FROM exchange_rates WHERE currency = t.currency AND date <= t.date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1), 1.0))) DESC LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as m FROM transactions ORDER BY m DESC
list.label: Cycle
list.name: cycle
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as m FROM transactions ORDER BY m DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT currency FROM exchange_rates UNION SELECT 'EUR' ORDER BY 1

list.query: SELECT DISTINCT category_group FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') ORDER BY category_group

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') ORDER BY category
list.label: Category
list.name: category
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') ORDER BY category
